response:
<<Ethical AI Rules>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust.
Trust guides all work.
Work needs care.
Care protects users.
Users deserve safety.
Safety is key.
Key points matter.
Matter most now.
Now we act.
Act with grace.
Section 2
Ethics shape design.
Design avoids harm.
Harm must cease.
Cease bad acts.
Acts need review.
Review brings truth.
Truth builds faith.
Faith grows strong.
Strong systems help.
Helping people first.
Section 3
AI needs rules.
Rules prevent abuse.
Abuse hurts lives.
Lives need respect.
Respect fosters peace.
Peace enables growth.
Growth requires balance.
Balance stops bias.
Bias causes pain.
Pain should end.
Section 4
Data needs care.
Care ensures privacy.
Privacy keeps secrets.
Secrets stay safe.
Safe data flows.
Flows need control.
Control limits access.
Access needs permission.
Permission grants rights.
Rights belong to all.
Section 5
Transparency builds trust.
Trust invites cooperation.
Cooperation drives progress.
Progress demands honesty.
Honesty reveals flaws.
Flows need fixing.
Fixing improves tools.
Tools serve humanity.
Humanity needs guidance.
Guidance comes from leaders.
Section 6
Leaders set standards.
Standards define behavior.
Behavior shapes culture.
Culture influences choices.
Choices determine outcomes.
Outcomes affect society.
Society needs fairness.
Fairness promotes justice.
Justice supports freedom.
Freedom allows innovation.
Section 7
Innovation needs limits.
Limits protect values.
Values guide development.
Development serves good.
Good lifts others.
Others benefit greatly.
Greatly impacts future.
Future holds promise.
Promise needs keeping.
Keeping requires effort.
Section 8
Effort yields results.
Results show impact.
Impact changes world.
World needs wisdom.
Wisdom guides action.
Action creates change.
Change brings hope.
Hope inspires dreams.
Dreams shape tomorrow.
Tomorrow starts today.
